name: 场景情绪 - 深海静谧
description: 深邃冷静，蓝灰色调，适合技术文章、商业分析与专业长文

h1.after: display: block; width: 52px; height: 3px; background: #4a7c9b; margin: 12px auto 0; border-radius: 999px;

h2.base: margin: 28px 0 10px; font-size: 1.35em; line-height: 1.5; border-bottom: 1px dashed rgba(74,124,155,0.3); padding-bottom: 8px;

styles.quote: border-left: 5px solid #4a7c9b; border-radius: 10px; padding: 14px 18px; background: #e8f0f8; margin: 1em 0; color: #526273; box-shadow: inset 0 0 12px rgba(74,124,155,0.08);

code.block: color: #3a4150; background: #f6f9fc; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(74,124,155,0.16); box-shadow: 0 8px 24px rgba(58,65,80,0.06); margin: 1.2em 0; padding: 1em; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; white-space: pre-wrap;

styles.image: max-width: 100%; height: auto; margin: 1.2em auto; display: block; border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 8px 28px rgba(58,65,80,0.08);
styles.link: color: #3d6a8a; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(61,106,138,0.35);

table.container: width: 100%; margin: 1em 0; border-collapse: collapse; border: 1px solid rgba(74,124,155,0.18);
table.header: background: #e8f0f8; font-weight: bold; color: #3d6a8a; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(74,124,155,0.22);

styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, rgba(74,124,155,0.28), transparent); margin: 24px 0;
